blocks.content: Edumatic 3000 is a self-contained educational platform that runs entirely in the browser. It requires no backend server or database, making it perfect for deployment on decentralized networks like IPFS. listItems: Linear Progression: Students must complete lessons in order - no skipping ahead!
Built-in Quizzing: Test student knowledge with multiple choice, true/false, and more.
Certificate of Completion: Reward students with printable certificates when they finish.
